reason: AC-1~AC-23 are verifier checklist; DoD section is the ship gate

Verify Coordinator (apps/runner/src/agents/coordinator/) NOT modified — router is downstream consumer, not extension; verify single-point dispatchStep router invariant intact when slice(fromIdx) is added

Verify shared types (RouterInput/RouterRecommendation/WorkflowRun.startStage) propagate to api (router.ts + routes + workflow-engine + store mapper) and web (UI fetch + display); verify CoordinatorAction.runType mirror fix in shared/coordinator.ts

Canonical FLOW_REGISTRY contract — router rules R10-R13 must respect existing 4 FlowIds without modification; spec append § Smart Router must cover trigger conditions / decision tree / startStage semantics / audit / Coordinator boundary
W2-1 zero-regression invariants for V1/feature.standard; verify W2-4 doesn't break the 'unknown flowId in registry' defensive pattern
W2-2a stage-history-aware acceptance gate (W2-4 inherits, no new gate work); SkillSpec inputs relaxation pattern affects skipped-stage degradation
W2-2b WorkflowRunType extension; W2-4 fixes the CoordinatorAction.runType mirror W2-2b missed (one of the small touches in PR1)
Verify RouterRecommendation is strict interface (not Record), confidence/rulesFired follow Coordinator conventions, FlowId / WorkflowStage / WorkflowRunType narrowing preserved
Verify dispatchStep _exhaustive: never default branch retained; runWorkflow slice(fromIdx) is purely positional (no flowId-aware branching); RunCtx not exported
Verify runWorkflow throws clear error on 'unknown startStage in flow'; mustSkill / executeXxx failure paths unchanged
Verify router.ts is pure function (deterministic, no side effects); /router/recommend is read-only (no DB writes); workflow-engine remains sole writer of workflow_runs
Verify workflow_runs.start_stage column migration is idempotent (columnNames guard) and non-disruptive (nullable DEFAULT NULL); rowToWorkflowRun mapping correct

Verify /router/recommend 400 on missing projectId; createWorkflowRun graceful fallback if router throws (defensive — router shouldn't throw, but if it does, falls back to 'feature.standard' with audit warning)
Verify UI smart-router card follows existing form conventions; /router/recommend fetch is debounced; user override path (4-FlowId dropdown) wired correctly
V2 § 3.2 Routing over Prescribing — verify router output shape matches design (建议起点 stage / 建议 flow / 关联知识列表 / 预估时间); § 4.2 first-phase trio honored (router selects among feature/issue/refactor)
